title: Add File mounts to play kube
body:
Both File and FileOrCreate options are supported.

Signed-off-by: Peter Hunt <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM other then closing the FD.

LGTM
Was wondering if we should defer the f.close, but I think it's good as you have it.
considering we don't need the file* after the file is created, I don't think a defer is really worth it. mine as well clean up asap :)
